text:
credit can be a good source of funding for the medium- and long-
                                                                                                                     term development; building a risk management mechanism jointly
                                                                                                                     with social forces and giving full play to financing portfolio can bet-
                                                                                                                     ter guard against financial risks; and by developing the bank though
                                                                                                                     party building, making full use of political and organizational
                                                                                                                     advantages and nurturing a credit culture with Chinese characteris-
                                                                                                                     tics, efforts can be concentrated on major projects. Moreover, by
                                                                                                                     adhering to the working principles that feature government priority,
                                                                                                                     timely help, prior planning, credit building, and financing promo-
                                                                                                                     tion and by establishing a business model featuring government
                                                                                                                     entry, financial incubation and market exit, we can link government
                                                                                                                     targets to market mechanisms and promote institutional building,
                                                                                                                     market development and credit building through financing, thereby
                                                                                                                     not only able to solve the difficulty of medium- and long-term con-
                                                                                                                     struction financing, but also enhance market players’ function to lay
                                                                                                                     a foundation for the realization of national strategic goals.
